# Known OpenAPI drift — routes that are intentionally excluded from the
# OpenAPI surface or that predate this verifier.
#
# Format: METHOD /path (one per line, comments start with #)
#
# Documentation UIs — these serve HTML documentation, not an API surface.
GET /api/v0/docs
GET /api/v0/redoc
# TODO(#3781): add openapi_paths_code_visualize fragment for this route.
POST /api/v0/code/visualize
# RFC 9728 OAuth 2.0 Protected Resource Metadata (#5163, F-2). Served on the MCP
# origin's unauthenticated well-known surface, not the /api/v0 API — it is a
# discovery document (authorization_servers, resource) consumed by OAuth
# clients, not an API operation, so it is intentionally excluded from the
# OpenAPI paths.
GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource
GET /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource/{rest...}
